title: atomref: curated atomic reference data and proatomic densities
description: atomref is a dependency-free-core Python package for curated atomic reference data, spherical neutral proatomic electron-density profiles, provenance-aware lookup policies, and pairwise reference-atom boundary estimators. The software and accompanying repository content are licensed under LGPL-3.0-or-later except for the bundled neutral proatomic-density snapshot, which is licensed separately under CC BY 4.0. See NOTICE.md for the exact licensing boundary, attribution, source hashes, and source DOIs.
